name: task-management
description: Full-stack task management app — React 19 + Express 5 + Node.js

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:with-db: npm run db:up && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:restart: docker compose down && docker compose up -d
